title: Claude Code 新增内置浏览器，可读取、点击和输入外部网站
title_zh: Claude Code 新增内置浏览器，可读取、点击和输入外部网站
full_text:
Claude Code now has a built-in browser that lets the AI read, click, and type on external websites
Claude Code now has a built-in browser that lets the AI read, click, and type on external websites
Claude Code now has a built-in browser that lets the AI open, read, and interact with web pages directly inside the development environment. Write actions on external sites are screened by classifiers, and purchases or account creations need user approval.
Claude Code now has a built-in browser that lets the AI open, read, and interact with web pages directly inside the development environment. Write actions on external sites are screened by classifiers, and purchases or account creations need user approval.

discovery_record.discovery_title: Claude Code 新增内置浏览器，可读取、点击和输入外部网站
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Anthropic 为 Claude Code 添加了集成浏览器窗口。Claude 现在可直接在应用内打开、读取、点击和输入网页，包括文档站点和问题追踪器等。该浏览器以标签页形式运行，可通过键盘快捷键打开。Claude 使用与预览本地应用相同的工具，但增加了额外安全检查：分类器会筛选对外部网站的写入操作，未经用户同意不会执行购买、创建账户或绕过 CAPTCHA 等行为。浏览器运行在无保存登录信息的干净配置文件上。组织可通过允许列表限制外部网站访问或完全禁用该工具。如需 Claude 在已登录会话中操作，应使用 Chrome 扩展。
